text:
Created attachment 146652
revive news/diablo

This patch applies against the latest in-tree version of news/diablo (should svn cp or reverse merge it).

It stages news/diablo and allows package building as user.
It also includes several small modernization/cleanup nits (Uses, strip, etc.)

I'm also attaching poudriere testport log.
